===== ./afritech/state_machine/state_schema.yaml =====
schema: afritech.state_machine.v1

state_machine:

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # STATE DEFINITIONS
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  states:

    - UNINITIALIZED
    - ADMITTED
    - EXECUTING
    - COMPLETED
    - FAILED

  initial_state: UNINITIALIZED

  terminal_states:
    - COMPLETED
    - FAILED

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # TRANSITION MODEL
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  transition_model:

    type: TOTAL               # ALL transitions must be defined
    enforcement: STRICT       # reject undefined transitions
    determinism: REQUIRED     # replay must reproduce same state sequence

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # TRANSITION DEFINITIONS (INLINE OPTIONAL)
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  transitions:

    allowed:

      - id: S1_ADMISSION
        from: UNINITIALIZED
        to: ADMITTED

      - id: S2_EXECUTION
        from: ADMITTED
        to: EXECUTING

      - id: S3_COMPLETION
        from: EXECUTING
        to: COMPLETED

      - id: S4_FAILURE
        from: EXECUTING
        to: FAILED

    forbidden:

      - from: UNINITIALIZED
        to: EXECUTING

      - from: COMPLETED
        to: EXECUTING

      - from: FAILED
        to: ADMITTED

      - from: EXECUTING
        to: ADMITTED

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # STATE INVARIANTS
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  invariants:

    - I19_STATE_TRANSITION_TOTALITY
      # ALL state transitions must be defined (allowed or forbidden)

    - I19_1_ALLOWED_ONLY
      # Only explicitly allowed transitions may occur

    - I19_2_FORBIDDEN_ENFORCED
      # Explicitly forbidden transitions MUST be rejected

    - I19_3_NO_IMPLICIT_TRANSITIONS
      # No transition may happen unless declared

    - I19_4_REPLAY_MATCH
      # Replay MUST produce identical state sequence

    - I19_5_SINGLE_STATE_AT_TIME
      # System MUST be in exactly one state

    - I19_6_INITIAL_STATE_FIXED
      # Execution MUST start in UNINITIALIZED

    - I19_7_TERMINAL_STATE_FINAL
      # No transition allowed after reaching terminal state

    - I19_8_TRANSITION_IDENTITY
      # Each transition MUST have unique id

    - I19_9_TRANSITION_HASH_BINDING
      # Each transition MUST be hashable and reproducible

    - I19_10_STATE_SPACE_COMPLETENESS
      # allowed ∪ forbidden MUST cover all state combinations

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # VALIDATION CONTRACT
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  validation:

    required_at_runtime: true
    required_for_trace_binding: true
    required_for_replay: true

    enforce_totality: true
    enforce_forbidden: true
    enforce_determinism: true

    failure_policy:

      type: HARD_FAILURE
      effect: EXECUTION_ABORT

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # REPLAY CONTRACT
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  replay:

    deterministic: true

    requirements:

      - identical_transition_sequence
      - identical_final_state
      - identical_transition_hashes

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # TRACE INTEGRATION
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  trace_binding:

    enabled: true

    requirements:

      - every transition MUST map to trace event
      - event.step MUST match transition id
      - event.output_hash MUST bind resulting state

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # AUTHORITY INTEGRATION
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  authority_binding:

    required: true

    rule:

      each_transition MUST be executed under valid authority_profile
      derived from GENESIS → REGISTRY

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # METADATA (NON-AUTHORITATIVE)
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  metadata:

    description: "AfriTech deterministic state machine"
    version: v1
    environment: production

    notes: >
      This state machine enforces semantic closure.
      No execution path exists outside of defined transitions.

===== ./afritech/state_machine/state_transitions.yaml =====
schema: afritech.state_transitions.v1

transitions:

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # DECLARED STATES (REPEATED FOR VALIDATION CONSISTENCY)
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  states:

    - UNINITIALIZED
    - ADMITTED
    - EXECUTING
    - COMPLETED
    - FAILED

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # ALLOWED TRANSITIONS (EXPLICIT ONLY)
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  allowed:

    - id: S1_ADMISSION
      from: UNINITIALIZED
      to: ADMITTED
      type: FORWARD
      terminal: false

    - id: S2_EXECUTION
      from: ADMITTED
      to: EXECUTING
      type: FORWARD
      terminal: false

    - id: S3_COMPLETION
      from: EXECUTING
      to: COMPLETED
      type: FORWARD
      terminal: true

    - id: S4_FAILURE
      from: EXECUTING
      to: FAILED
      type: FORWARD
      terminal: true

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # FORBIDDEN TRANSITIONS (TOTAL COMPLEMENT)
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  forbidden:

    # -------------------------------------------------------------
    # FROM UNINITIALIZED
    # -------------------------------------------------------------

    - from: UNINITIALIZED
      to: EXECUTING

    - from: UNINITIALIZED
      to: COMPLETED

    - from: UNINITIALIZED
      to: FAILED

    # -------------------------------------------------------------
    # FROM ADMITTED
    # -------------------------------------------------------------

    - from: ADMITTED
      to: UNINITIALIZED

    - from: ADMITTED
      to: COMPLETED

    - from: ADMITTED
      to: FAILED

    # -------------------------------------------------------------
    # FROM EXECUTING
    # -------------------------------------------------------------

    - from: EXECUTING
      to: UNINITIALIZED

    - from: EXECUTING
      to: ADMITTED

    # -------------------------------------------------------------
    # TERMINAL STATES (CRITICAL)
    # -------------------------------------------------------------

    # COMPLETED is terminal
    - from: COMPLETED
      to: UNINITIALIZED

    - from: COMPLETED
      to: ADMITTED

    - from: COMPLETED
      to: EXECUTING

    - from: COMPLETED
      to: FAILED

    # FAILED is terminal
    - from: FAILED
      to: UNINITIALIZED

    - from: FAILED
      to: ADMITTED

    - from: FAILED
      to: EXECUTING

    - from: FAILED
      to: COMPLETED

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # COMPLETENESS GUARANTEE
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  completeness:

    total_states: 5

    expected_transitions: 25   # N x N (5 × 5)

    coverage:

      allowed_count: 4
      forbidden_count: 21

      rule: >
        allowed + forbidden MUST equal total possible transitions

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # TRANSITION PROPERTIES
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  properties:

    deterministic: true
    replay_safe: true

    rules:

      - exactly_one_transition_per_step
      - no_multi_state_overlap
      - no_implicit_transition
      - terminal_states_are_final
      - forward_progress_only

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # INVARIANTS (ENFORCED CONTRACT)
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  invariants:

    - I19_STATE_TRANSITION_TOTALITY
      # All transitions explicitly defined

    - I19_1_ALLOWED_ONLY
      # Only declared allowed transitions can execute

    - I19_2_FORBIDDEN_ENFORCED
      # Forbidden transitions must always fail

    - I19_3_NO_IMPLICIT_TRANSITIONS
      # Any undefined transition is illegal

    - I19_4_REPLAY_MATCH
      # Replay must produce identical sequence

    - I19_5_SINGLE_STATE_AT_TIME
      # System can only occupy one state

    - I19_6_INITIAL_STATE_FIXED
      # Must always start from UNINITIALIZED

    - I19_7_TERMINAL_STATE_FINAL
      # No transitions from terminal states

    - I19_8_TOTAL_STATE_SPACE_COVERED
      # allowed ∪ forbidden = ALL possible transitions

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # VALIDATION RULES (STRICT)
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  validation:

    enforce_totality: true
    enforce_disjoint_sets: true
    enforce_unique_ids: true
    enforce_terminal_finality: true

    failure_policy:

      type: HARD_FAILURE
      effect: EXECUTION_ABORT

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # TRACE BINDING REQUIREMENTS
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  trace_binding:

    enabled: true

    rules:

      - each transition MUST map to trace event.step
      - event index MUST reflect transition order
      - transition_hash MUST match trace event_hash

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # REPLAY CONTRACT
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  replay:

    deterministic: true

    required:

      - identical_transition_sequence
      - identical_final_state
      - identical_transition_hashes

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # METADATA
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  metadata:

    version: v1
    environment: production

    description: >
      Fully closed state transition system with total coverage.
      No undefined behavior exists. All transitions are explicitly
      classified as allowed or forbidden.

    notes: >
      This file guarantees semantic closure.
      Any transition outside defined sets MUST cause rejection.

===== ./afritech/system/identity.yaml =====
schema: afritech.system.identity.v1

system:

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # CORE IDENTITY
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  name: AfriTech
  canonical_namespace: afritech

  status: ACTIVE
  mode: CONSTITUTIONAL_RUNTIME

  description: >
    AfriTech is a constitutionally-governed execution system
    where runtime legitimacy, execution validity, and system
    evolution are strictly enforced through attested artifacts,
    deterministic replay, and authority-bound inference.

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # CONSTITUTIONAL ROOT
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  constitutional_root:

    registry: afritech/registry/registry.yaml
    attestation: afritech/registry/attestation.yaml

    source_of_truth: registry
    authority_precedence:
      - registry
      - attestation
      - runtime_certificate
      - replay_transcript

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # CURRENT STATE SNAPSHOT
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  state:

    constitutional_epoch: 6
    registry_status: SEALED
    attestation_status: SEALED

    runtime_admission_required: true
    replay_required: true

    deterministic_execution_only: true
    authority_required_for_all_requests: true

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # EXECUTION MODEL
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  execution_model:

    type: CLOSED_WORLD

    requirements:

      runtime_certificate_required: true
      execution_surfaces_declared: true
      authority_binding_required: true
      replay_verification_required: true

    forbidden:

      - undeclared_execution_surfaces
      - runtime_mutation
      - authority_escalation
      - nondeterministic_execution

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # ARCHITECTURAL LAYERS
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  architecture:

    layers:

      - name: constitutional_core
        path: afritech/registry/
        role: SOURCE_OF_TRUTH

      - name: governance
        path: afritech/governance/
        role: RULE_DEFINITION

      - name: runtime
        path: afritech/runtime/
        role: EXECUTION_ENGINE

      - name: inference
        path: afritech/inference/
        role: AUTHORITY_BOUND_REASONING

      - name: replay
        path: afritech/replay/
        role: EXECUTION_PROOF

      - name: proof
        path: afritech/proof/
        role: CERTIFICATION

      - name: evaluation
        path: afritech/evaluation/
        role: DRIFT_DETECTION

      - name: truth
        path: afritech/truth/
        role: EPISTEMIC_MODEL

      - name: guards
        path: afritech/guards/
        role: EXECUTION_GATING

      - name: audit
        path: afritech/audit/
        role: EVENT_LOGGING

      - name: infrastructure
        path: afritech/infrastructure/
        role: NON_CONSTITUTIONAL_SUPPORT

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # AUTHORITY SYSTEM
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  authority:

    registry_source: afritech/registry/authority_profiles.yaml
    execution_source: afritech/inference/authority_profiles.yaml

    invariants:

      - no_runtime_authority_creation
      - no_authority_escalation
      - authority_precedes_inference
      - authority_violation_is_terminal

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # RUNTIME ADMISSION
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  runtime_admission:

    required: true

    certificate:

      schema: afritech.runtime.certificate.v1
      path: afritech/proof/certificates/

    admission_engine:
      path: afritech/runtime/admission/admission_engine.py

    invariant: >
      No runtime exists without a valid RuntimeCertificate.

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # REPLAY SYSTEM
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  replay:

    required: true

    transcript_schema: afritech/replay/transcript.yaml

    verifier:
      path: afritech/replay/verify.py

    invariants:

      - deterministic_only
      - replay_hash_terminal
      - transcript_required

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # ATTESTATION BINDING
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  attestation_binding:

    required: true

    invariant: >
      RuntimeCertificate MUST match attestation across all
      constitutional bindings.

    enforced_by:
      - CI-ATTEST-BIND-001
      - CI-CERT-SIGNATURE-001

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # CI ENFORCEMENT LAYER
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  ci_enforcement:

    location: afritech/replay/ci/

    enforced_rules:

      - CI-RUNTIME-ADMISSION-001
      - CI-CERT-SIGNATURE-001
      - CI-CERT-VERIFY-001
      - CI-ATTEST-BIND-001
      - CI-REPLAY-FAIL-001
      - CI-REPLAY-AUTH-ORDER-001

    required_for_execution_legitimacy: true

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # NON-OBSERVABILITY INVARIANT
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  non_observability:

    enforced: true

    definition: >
      System legitimacy MUST be derivable solely from
      attested artifacts, replay transcripts, and
      deterministic execution.

      No hidden state, observer, or implicit context
      is permitted.

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # GOVERNANCE MODEL
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  governance:

    model: CENTRALIZED_CONSTITUTIONAL

    mutation_path:

      - ADR_APPROVAL
      - EPOCH_ADVANCE
      - REGISTRY_RESEAL

    mutation_constraints:

      - silent_mutation_forbidden
      - epoch_monotonicity_required
      - replay_validity_preserved

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # PHASE CLASSIFICATION
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  lifecycle:

    current_phase: PHASE_2B

    completed_phases:

      - PHASE_1_DETERMINISTIC_REPLAY
      - PHASE_2A_AUTHORITY_ISOLATION
      - PHASE_2B_REAL_INFERENCE_BINDING

    next_phase: PHASE_3_MULTI_AGENT

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # SYSTEM GUARANTEES
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  guarantees:

    - execution_requires_admission
    - authority_required_for_all_actions
    - deterministic_execution_only
    - replay_verification_required
    - attestation_binding_required
    - no_implicit_behavior

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # CONSTITUTIONAL ASSERTION
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  constitutional_assertion: >
    AfriTech operates as a closed constitutional system
    in which all execution, authority, and runtime existence
    are explicitly declared, cryptographically bound,
    and replay-verifiable.

    Any behavior not defined within constitutional artifacts
    is considered non-existent.

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # FINAL ASSERTION
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  final_assertion: >
    AfriTech is a constitutionally bounded execution system.

    No runtime exists without admission.
    No execution exists without authority.
    No truth exists without replay.
    No legitimacy exists outside the constitution.


===== ./afritech/trace/trace_schema.yaml =====
schema: afritech.trace.v1

trace:

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # TRACE IDENTITY
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  trace_id: string                # UUIDv4 (externally assigned or deterministic)
  request_hash: sha256           # Canonical hash of request payload

  authority_profile: string      # MUST match registry authority
  epoch_id: string               # MUST match active epoch

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # TRACE EVENTS (ORDERED + PARTIAL DAG)
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  events:

    - index: int                 # STRICT: 0..N-1 (no gaps)

      step: string               # canonical step name (enum-bound)

      # -------------------------
      # CAUSAL STRUCTURE
      # -------------------------

      parent_event_hash: sha256  # previous event hash OR "GENESIS" if index=0
      depends_on:                # optional DAG edges
        - int                    # indices of prior events (must be < index)

      # -------------------------
      # AUTHORITY CONTEXT
      # -------------------------

      authority_context_hash: sha256
      # derived from:
      #   authority_profile
      #   runtime_context
      #   permissions snapshot

      # -------------------------
      # INPUT / OUTPUT BINDING
      # -------------------------

      input_hash: sha256         # canonical input
      output_hash: sha256        # canonical output

      # -------------------------
      # EVENT HASH (CRITICAL)
      # -------------------------

      event_hash: sha256
      # sha256 over:
      #   index
      #   step
      #   parent_event_hash
      #   depends_on
      #   authority_context_hash
      #   input_hash
      #   output_hash

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # TRACE ROOT (GLOBAL COMMITMENT)
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  trace_root_hash: sha256
  # sha256(
  #   canonical_list(event_hash)
  # )

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # OPTIONAL EXTENSIONS (STRICTLY CONTROLLED)
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  metadata:

    version: int                 # trace versioning for compatibility

    generation_mode:             # deterministic / replay / test
      enum:
        - deterministic
        - replay
        - test

    origin:

      runtime_id: string         # runtime instance id
      certificate_id: string     # runtime certificate binding

    integrity:

      canonicalization: json_sorted_compact
      hashing_algorithm: sha256
      encoding: utf-8

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # VALIDATION RULES (FULL CONTRACT)
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------

  invariants:

    - I16_CANONICAL_TRACE_BINDING

    - I16_1_INDEX_CONTIGUITY
      # index MUST be contiguous [0..N-1]

    - I16_2_PARENT_CHAIN_VALID
      # each event[i].parent_event_hash == event[i-1].event_hash

    - I16_3_DEPENDENCY_VALIDITY
      # depends_on ONLY references indices < index

    - I16_4_DEPENDENCY_ACYCLIC
      # DAG must contain no cycles

    - I16_5_EVENT_HASH_CORRECT
      # recomputed hash MUST match event_hash

    - I16_6_ROOT_HASH_CORRECT
      # recomputed root MUST match trace_root_hash

    - I16_7_DETERMINISTIC_SERIALIZATION
      # canonical JSON:
      #   sorted keys
      #   compact separators
      #   UTF-8 encoding

    - I16_8_AUTHORITY_BINDING
      # authority_context_hash MUST be derivable and consistent

    - I16_9_INPUT_OUTPUT_BINDING
      # input/output hashes MUST match execution replay

    - I16_10_REPLAY_EQUALITY
      # replay(trace) MUST produce identical trace_root_hash

    - I16_11_NO_EXTERNAL_STATE
      # trace MUST encode all state required for replay

    - I16_12_IMMUTABILITY
      # any mutation MUST invalidate trace_root_hash


===== ./afritech/truth/epistemic_confidence.yaml =====
# afritech/truth/epistemic_confidence.yaml
#
# STATUS: CANONICAL EPISTEMIC CONFIDENCE SPECIFICATION
#
# This file defines the ONLY admissible epistemic confidence
# structure permitted in a TruthPacket during the
# FIRST_EXECUTABLE_PROOF phase.
#
# Confidence is treated as a constitutional artifact.
# It must be decomposed, normalized, auditable, and replayable.
#
# Any TruthPacket containing confidence information that
# deviates from this schema is constitutionally invalid.

version: EPISTEMIC_CONFIDENCE_V1

applicability:
  phase: FIRST_EXECUTABLE_PROOF
  enforced_by:
    - TruthPacketConstructor
    - ConstitutionalAgent
    - ReplayVerifier

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# GLOBAL EPISTEMIC INVARIANTS
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

global_invariants:

  - id: NO_SCALAR_CONFIDENCE
    description: >
      Scalar or collapsed confidence values are forbidden.
      Confidence MUST be decomposed into explicit dimensions.

  - id: EVIDENCE_BOUND_ONLY
    description: >
      Confidence MUST derive exclusively from attestable,
      replayable inputs.
      Model self-assessed confidence is forbidden.

  - id: REPLAY_REPRODUCIBILITY_REQUIRED
    description: >
      Every confidence dimension MUST be recomputable
      during replay under identical conditions.

  - id: NORMALIZATION_REQUIRED
    description: >
      All confidence dimensions MUST be normalized
      onto a common numeric scale.

  - id: UNCERTAINTY_IS_LEGITIMATE
    description: >
      Low confidence values are acceptable.
      Absence of confidence inflation is not a failure.

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# NORMALIZATION RULES
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

normalization:

  scale:
    min: 0.0
    max: 1.0

  semantics:
    "0.0": >
      No admissible epistemic support.
      Dimension is effectively unsatisfied.
    "0.5": >
      Partial, weak, or incomplete epistemic support.
    "1.0": >
      Fully satisfied epistemic condition
      under declared constitutional constraints.

  rounding:
    precision: 4
    deterministic: true

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# EPISTEMIC CONFIDENCE DIMENSIONS
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

epistemic_confidence:

  # ===============================================================
  # EVIDENTIARY CONFIDENCE
  # ===============================================================

  evidentiary:
    description: >
      Measures whether claims are supported by
      identifiable, citable evidence.
    inputs:
      - provenance_chain
      - citation_count
    constraints:
      min_citations: 1
    replay_dependencies:
      - provenance_chain_hash
    normalization_rule: >
      f(citation_count, evidence_uniqueness)

  # ===============================================================
  # SOURCE CONSENSUS CONFIDENCE
  # ===============================================================

  source_consensus:
    description: >
      Measures agreement across independent sources.
      Disagreement lowers confidence but does not
      invalidate claims.
    inputs:
      - provenance_chain
      - source_overlap
    constraints:
      independence_required: true
    replay_dependencies:
      - provenance_chain_hash
    normalization_rule: >
      f(independent_source_count, contradiction_ratio)

  # ===============================================================
  # REPLAY DETERMINISM CONFIDENCE
  # ===============================================================

  replay_determinism:
    description: >
      Measures whether execution is deterministically
      reproducible under replay.
    inputs:
      - execution_trace
      - replay_hash
    constraints:
      deterministic_required: true
    replay_dependencies:
      - execution_trace_hash
    normalization_rule: >
      1.0 if replay_hash matches exactly
      else 0.0

  # ===============================================================
  # ATTESTATION STRENGTH
  # ===============================================================

  attestation_strength:
    description: >
      Measures support from required attestations.
      During FIRST_EXECUTABLE_PROOF, this dimension
      may be minimal but must be explicit.
    inputs:
      - attestations
    constraints:
      min_attestations: 0
    replay_dependencies:
      - attestation_hashes
    normalization_rule: >
      f(attestation_count, attestation_weight)

  # ===============================================================
  # TEMPORAL STABILITY
  # ===============================================================

  temporal_stability:
    description: >
      Measures whether claims remain stable over
      constitutional time.
      Cross-epoch evaluation is optional at this phase.
    inputs:
      - epoch_id
      - prior_claim_hashes
    constraints:
      requires_cross_epoch_check: false
    replay_dependencies:
      - epoch_id
    normalization_rule: >
      1.0 if no known prior contradiction
      else value < 1.0

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# OPTIONAL AGGREGATION (STRICTLY CONTROLLED)
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
#
# Aggregation is optional and MUST NOT replace or
# obscure decomposed confidence dimensions.

aggregation:

  allowed: true

  produces:
    - optional_summary_metric

  constraints:
    method_must_be_declared: true
    aggregation_must_reference_dimensions: true
    aggregation_must_be_replayable: true
    aggregation_must_not_be_decision_authoritative: true

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# PROHIBITED CONFIDENCE PRACTICES
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

forbidden_practices:

  - scalar_confidence
  - model_self_confidence
  - narrative_confidence_labels
  - undocumented_aggregation
  - non_normalized_values
  - confidence_without_provenance
  - confidence_without_causal_trace

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# FAILURE CONDITIONS
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

failure_conditions:

  - missing_required_dimension
  - non_normalized_value
  - irreproducible_computation
  - scalar_confidence_detected
  - confidence_without_evidence
  - confidence_without_causality

failure_response:
  type: HARD_FAILURE
  effect: >
    TruthPacket legitimacy is invalidated and
    execution proof fails.

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# CONSTITUTIONAL ASSERTION
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

constitutional_assertion: >
  AfriTech treats epistemic confidence as a
  constitutional computation, not an expression
  of belief.
  What cannot be decomposed, normalized, and replayed
  is epistemically illegitimate.



===== ./docs/api/afriride_ride_lifecycle.openapi.yaml =====
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: AfriRide Ride Lifecycle API
  version: 0.1.0
  description: Interface-only API contract for ride lifecycle, replay, receipt, and support.

paths:
  /ride/request:
    post:
      summary: Request a ride
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Ride requested

  /ride/accept:
    post:
      summary: Driver accepts ride
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Ride accepted

  /ride/start:
    post:
      summary: Start ride
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Ride started

  /ride/complete:
    post:
      summary: Complete ride
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Ride completed

  /ride/{ride_id}/receipt:
    get:
      summary: Get completed ride receipt
      parameters:
        - name: ride_id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Receipt returned

  /ride/{ride_id}/replay:
    get:
      summary: Get ride replay explanation
      parameters:
        - name: ride_id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Replay returned

  /ride/{ride_id}/price-explanation:
    get:
      summary: Get price explanation
      parameters:
        - name: ride_id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Price explanation returned

  /support/ticket:
    post:
      summary: Create replay-first support ticket
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Support ticket created


===== ./docs/roadmap/FUTURE_SURFACE_STATUS.yaml =====
schema: afritech.ecosystem.surface_status.v1

version: 1

metadata:
  purpose: future ecosystem surface classification
  proof_role: non_admissible_until_graduated

surface: AFRIPAY

status: FROZEN

runtime_active: false

replay_participating: false

proof_admissible: false

freeze_reason: >
  AfriPay is retained as an explicitly frozen ecosystem surface
  until a future constitutional amendment supplies runtime,
  replay, proof, and witness bindings.

===== ./driver_app/node_modules/@segment/loosely-validate-event/circle.yml =====
machine:
  node:
    version: 6

dependencies:
  pre:
    - npm config set "//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken" $NPM_AUTH
    - sudo apt-key adv --fetch-keys http://dl.yarnpkg.com/debian/pubkey.gpg
    - echo "deb http://dl.yarnpkg.com/debian/ stable main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list
    - sudo apt-get update -qq
    - sudo apt-get install -y -qq yarn
  cache_directories:
    - ~/.yarn-cache
  override:
    - yarn

test:
  override:
    - yarn test

deployment:
  publish:
    tag: /v?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)*(-.+)?/
    commands:
      - npm publish

===== ./driver_app/node_modules/ast-types/.github/workflows/main.yml =====
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ master ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ master ]

jobs:
  test:
    name: Test on node ${{ matrix.node_version }} and ${{ matrix.os }}
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node_version: ['10', '12', '14', '15', '16', '17']
        os: [ubuntu-latest]

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2
    - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node_version }}
      uses: actions/setup-node@v1
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node_version }}

    - name: npm install, build and test
      run: |
        npm install
        npm run build --if-present
        npm test

===== ./driver_app/node_modules/chrome-launcher/.github/workflows/ci.yml =====
name: 🛠

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request: # run on all PRs, not just PRs to a particular branch

jobs:
  basics:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node: [ 'latest', 'lts/*', 'lts/-1' ]
    name: basics (node ${{ matrix.node }})

    steps:
    - name: git clone
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Setup node
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node }}
        cache: 'yarn'

    - run: yarn --frozen-lockfile --network-timeout 1000000
    - run: yarn build

    - run: yarn test-formatting
    - run: yarn type-check

    # Run tests that require headful Chrome.
    - run: sudo apt-get install xvfb
    - name: yarn test
      run: xvfb-run --auto-servernum yarn test --reporter=spec

  unit:
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [macos-latest, windows-latest]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    name: unit_${{ matrix.os }}

    steps:
    - name: git clone
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Use Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: lts/*
        cache: 'yarn'

    - run: yarn --frozen-lockfile --network-timeout 1000000
    - run: yarn build
    - run: yarn test --reporter=spec


===== ./driver_app/node_modules/chrome-launcher/.github/workflows/lh-smoke.yml =====
name: smoke

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request: # run on all PRs, not just PRs to a particular branch

jobs:
  # Only run smoke tests for windows against stable chrome.
  lh-smoke-windows:
    strategy:
      matrix:
        smoke-test-shard: [1, 2]
      # e.g. if set 1 fails, continue with set 2 anyway
      fail-fast: false
    runs-on: windows-latest
    name: Windows smoke ${{ matrix.smoke-test-shard }}/2

    steps:
    - name: git clone
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Use Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: lts/*
        cache: 'yarn'
    
    # chrome-launcher
    # This'll add lighthouse AND install chrome-launcher's deps
    - run: yarn add --frozen-lockfile --network-timeout 1000000 -D https://github.com/GoogleChrome/lighthouse.git#main
    - run: yarn build

    # lighthouse 
    - run: yarn --cwd node_modules/lighthouse/ install --frozen-lockfile --network-timeout 1000000
    - run: yarn reset-link
    - run: yarn --cwd node_modules/lighthouse/ build-report

    - name: Run smoke tests
      # Windows bots are slow, so only run enough tests to verify matching behavior.
      run: yarn --cwd node_modules/lighthouse/ smoke --debug -j=2 --retries=0 --shard=${{ matrix.smoke-test-shard }}/2 dbw oopif offline lantern metrics

    - name: Upload failures
      if: failure()
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v1
      with:
        name: Smokehouse (windows)
        path: node_modules/lighthouse/.tmp/smokehouse-ci-failures/

===== ./driver_app/node_modules/jscodeshift/.github/workflows/test.yml =====
name: test

on:
  workflow_call:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [12.x, 14.x, 16.x]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: yarn --frozen-lockfile
      - name: Run test
        run: yarn test

===== ./driver_app/node_modules/json-schema-traverse/.eslintrc.yml =====
extends: eslint:recommended
env:
  node: true
  browser: true
rules:
  block-scoped-var: 2
  complexity: [2, 15]
  curly: [2, multi-or-nest, consistent]
  dot-location: [2, property]
  dot-notation: 2
  indent: [2, 2, SwitchCase: 1]
  linebreak-style: [2, unix]
  new-cap: 2
  no-console: [2, allow: [warn, error]]
  no-else-return: 2
  no-eq-null: 2
  no-fallthrough: 2
  no-invalid-this: 2
  no-return-assign: 2
  no-shadow: 1
  no-trailing-spaces: 2
  no-use-before-define: [2, nofunc]
  quotes: [2, single, avoid-escape]
  semi: [2, always]
  strict: [2, global]
  valid-jsdoc: [2, requireReturn: false]
  no-control-regex: 0


===== ./driver_app/node_modules/json-schema-traverse/.github/FUNDING.yml =====
github: epoberezkin
tidelift: "npm/json-schema-traverse"


===== ./driver_app/node_modules/json-schema-traverse/.github/workflows/build.yml =====
name: build

on:
  push:
    branches: [master]
  pull_request:
    branches: ["*"]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [10.x, 12.x, 14.x]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      - run: npm install
      - run: npm test
      - name: Coveralls
        uses: coverallsapp/github-action@master
        with:
          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}


===== ./driver_app/node_modules/json-schema-traverse/.github/workflows/publish.yml =====
name: publish

on:
  release:
    types: [published]

jobs:
  publish-npm:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: 14
          registry-url: https://registry.npmjs.org/
      - run: npm install
      - run: npm test
      - name: Publish beta version to npm
        if: "github.event.release.prerelease"
        run: npm publish --tag beta
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
      - name: Publish to npm
        if: "!github.event.release.prerelease"
        run: npm publish
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}

  ecmaVersion: 6
globals:
  beforeEach: false
  describe: false
  it: false

===== ./driver_app/node_modules/plist/.github/workflows/ci.yml =====
name: ci

on:
  push:
  pull_request:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [ '14', '16', '18' ]

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      uses: actions/setup-node@v1
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}

    - run: npm install
    - run: npm test

===== ./driver_app/node_modules/recast/.github/dependabot.yml =====
# Please see the documentation for all configuration options:
# https://help.github.com/github/administering-a-repository/configuration-options-for-dependency-updates

version: 2
updates:
  - package-ecosystem: "npm" # See documentation for possible values
    directory: "/" # Location of package manifests
    schedule:
      interval: "daily"


===== ./driver_app/node_modules/recast/.github/workflows/main.yml =====
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ master ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ master ]

jobs:
  test:
    name: Test on node ${{ matrix.node_version }} and ${{ matrix.os }}
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node_version: ['10.x', '12.x', '14.x', '15.x', '16.x']
        os: [ubuntu-latest]

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2
    - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node_version }}
      uses: actions/setup-node@v1
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node_version }}

    - name: npm install, build and test
      run: |
        npm install
        npm run build --if-present
        npm test

===== ./driver_app/node_modules/requireg/node_modules/resolve/appveyor.yml =====
version: 1.0.{build}
skip_branch_with_pr: true
build: off

environment:
  matrix:
    - nodejs_version: "9"
    - nodejs_version: "8"
    - nodejs_version: "7"
    - nodejs_version: "6"
    - nodejs_version: "5"
    - nodejs_version: "4"
    - nodejs_version: "3"
    - nodejs_version: "2"
    - nodejs_version: "1"
    - nodejs_version: "0.12"
    - nodejs_version: "0.10"
    - nodejs_version: "0.8"
    - nodejs_version: "0.6"
matrix:
  # fast_finish: true
  allow_failures:
    - nodejs_version: "0.8"
    - nodejs_version: "0.6"

platform:
  - x86
  - x64

# Install scripts. (runs after repo cloning)
install:
 # Get the latest stable version of Node.js or io.js
 - ps: Install-Product node $env:nodejs_version $env:platform
 - IF %nodejs_version% EQU 0.6 npm config set strict-ssl false && npm -g install npm@1.3
 - IF %nodejs_version% EQU 0.8 npm config set strict-ssl false && npm -g install npm@1.4.28 && npm install -g npm@4.5
 - set PATH=%APPDATA%\npm;%PATH%
 #- IF %nodejs_version% NEQ 0.6 AND %nodejs_version% NEQ 0.8 npm -g install npm
 # install modules
 - npm install

# Post-install test scripts.
test_script:
 # Output useful info for debugging.
 - node --version
 - npm --version
 # run tests
 - npm run tests-only

===== ./driver_app/node_modules/reusify/.github/workflows/ci.yml =====
name: ci

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  legacy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: ['0.10', '0.12', 4.x, 6.x, 8.x, 10.x, 12.x, 13.x, 14.x, 15.x, 16.x]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Use Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}

      - name: Install
        run: |
          npm install --production && npm install tape

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          npm run test

  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [18.x, 20.x, 22.x]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Use Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}

      - name: Install
        run: |
          npm install

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          npm run test:coverage

  types:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Use Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22

      - name: Install
        run: |
          npm install

      - name: Run types tests
        run: |
          npm run test:typescript

  lint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Use Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22

      - name: Install
        run: |
          npm install

      - name: Lint
        run: |
          npm run lint

===== ./driver_app/node_modules/xml2js/node_modules/xmlbuilder/appveyor.yml =====
environment:
  matrix:
    - nodejs_version: "4"
    - nodejs_version: "5"
    - nodejs_version: "6"
    - nodejs_version: "8"
    - nodejs_version: "10"
    - nodejs_version: "" # latest

install:
  - ps: "Install-Product node $env:nodejs_version"
  - "npm install"

test_script:
  - "node --version"
  - "npm --version"
  - "npm test"

build: off



===== ./ecosystems/afriride/constitution/epochs/EPOCH-0008-replay-authority.yaml =====
schema: ecosystems.afriride.constitution.epoch.v1
epoch: EPOCH-0008
status: FROZEN
authority: AFRIRIDE_CONSTITUTION
title: Replay Authority Boundary
activated_by:
  - ADR-0013-replay-taxonomy-registry
scope:
  runtime_active: false
  replay_authoritative: true
  mutation_authority: false
  semantic_authority: false
guarantees:
  - replay_scope_is_declared
  - replay_hashes_are_deterministic
  - observational_classification_has_no_execution_authority
  - failures_are_taxonomy_bound
forbidden:
  - retry_interpretation
  - semantic_equivalence_inference
  - identity_collapsing
  - representation_authority_propagation
validators:
  - ecosystems.afriride.proofs.replay.replay_consistency_checker
  - ecosystems.afriride.proofs.replay.replay_correspondence_proof
  - ecosystems.afriride.proofs.governance.doctrine_compliance_validator
completion:
  empty: false
  implementation_state: FROZEN
  freeze_reason: >
    Epoch 0008 is retained as replay-authority doctrine until
    a future admitted AfriRide runtime epoch binds it to active
    execution.

id: I3_NO_SILENT_MUTATION
status: IMPLEMENTED
authority: AFRIRIDE_CONSTITUTION
statement: Every AfriRide state mutation must be represented in replay evidence.
applies_to:
  - ride_state
  - driver_assignment
  - replay_trace
requires:
  - before_state_hash
  - operation
  - after_state_hash
  - replay_trace_entry

  - hidden_assignment_change
  - unrecorded_retry
  - out_of_band_state_write

  - ecosystems.afriride.proofs.replay.replay_consistency_checker

  replay_participating: true

===== ./ecosystems/afriride/continuity/index.yaml =====
schema: ecosystems.afriride.continuity.index.v1
version: 1

positioning:
  statement: >
    AfriRide is a continuity-critical coordination environment used to validate
    deterministic operational recovery under mobility disruption.
  forbidden_positioning:
    - generic_ride_hailing_claim
    - doctrine_as_product_surface
    - optimization_claim_without_replay_proof

metrics:
  required:
    - replay_equivalent
    - identity_continuity
    - coordination_continuity
    - authority_conflict_prevented
    - reconstruction_complete
    - epoch_replay_stable

scenarios:
  AFRIRIDE-CONT-001:
    class: connectivity_loss_recovery
    description: Driver-side connectivity loss recovers to one replay-equivalent trip assignment.
    targets:
      - connectivity_loss_recovery
      - SEM-RPL-001
      - SEM-ID-001
      - AX-RPL-002
  AFRIRIDE-CONT-002:
    class: replay_reconstruction
    description: Dispute reconstruction emits transcript and mutation trace hashes from execution artifacts.
    targets:
      - replay_reconstruction
      - SEM-RPL-001
      - AX-RPL-002
      - trace_complete
  AFRIRIDE-CONT-003:
    class: adversarial_coordination
    description: Duplicate driver assignment authority is refused deterministically.
    targets:
      - adversarial_coordination
      - SEM-DET-001
      - SEM-ADM-001
      - AX-ADM-003
  AFRIRIDE-CONT-004:
    class: offline_operational_continuity
    description: Offline independent ride operations rejoin with stable driver identity and replay hash.
    targets:
      - offline_operational_continuity
      - SEM-RPL-001
      - SEM-ID-001
      - AX-ID-003
  AFRIRIDE-CONT-005:
    class: multi_epoch_recovery
    description: Trip execution remains replay-stable across a deterministic epoch chain.
    targets:
      - multi_epoch_recovery
      - SEM-DET-001
      - SEM-RPL-001
      - AX-DET-002


===== ./ecosystems/afriride/core/constitutional/determinism_spec.yaml =====

#ecosystems/afriride/core/constitutional/determinism.yaml
determinism_contract:
  domain: afriride

  version: "0.1"
  status: enforced

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # ✅ WHAT IS GUARANTEED
  # --------------------------------------------------
  scope: decision_causality

  guarantees:
    - identical_inputs_produce_identical_decisions
    - identical_event_streams_produce_identical_state
    - execution_trace_is_deterministically_hashable

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # ✅ DETERMINISTIC DECISIONS (MUST BE PURE)
  # --------------------------------------------------
  deterministic_decisions:
    - ride_request_admission
    - authority_validation
    - guard_evaluation
    - driver_assignment
    - dispatch_retry_policy
    - trip_state_transition
    - fare_policy_application

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # ✅ NON-DETERMINISTIC INPUTS (MUST BE NORMALIZED)
  # --------------------------------------------------
  nondeterministic_inputs:
    - gps_noise
    - driver_location_latency
    - network_delay
    - timestamp_variability
    - driver_availability_fluctuation

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # ✅ NORMALIZATION RULES (MANDATORY)
  # --------------------------------------------------
  normalization_rules:
    driver_selection:
      - driver_list_sorted_by_id
      - stable_priority_ordering

    time_handling:
      - timestamps_truncated_to_seconds
      - no wall_clock_dependency_in_decisions

    geo_handling:
      - geo_positions_rounded_5dp
      - distance_calculated_with_fixed_precision

    collections:
      - unordered_sets_must_be_sorted_before_iteration

    randomness:
      - randomness_forbidden
      - if_required_must_use_fixed_seed

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # ✅ EVENT & TRACE CONSISTENCY
  # --------------------------------------------------
  event_constraints:
    - events_must_be_emitted_in_deterministic_order
    - event_payloads_must_be_serialization_stable
    - event_ids_must_not_depend_on_runtime_entropy

  trace_constraints:
    - decision_trace_structure_is_static
    - serialization_must_use_sorted_keys
    - hash_function_must_be_sha256

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # ✅ REPLAY CLAIM (CRITICAL)
  # --------------------------------------------------
  replay_claim:
    guarantees_decision_trace_identity: true
    guarantees_event_sequence_identity: true
    guarantees_state_reconstruction_equivalence: true

    does_not_claim_physical_identity: true
    does_not_claim_real_time_equivalence: true

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # ✅ VIOLATION POLICY (STRICT)
  # --------------------------------------------------
  violation_policy:
    on_nondeterminism_detected: reject_execution
    on_trace_mismatch: fail_replay
    on_event_divergence: invalidate_state
    on_unstable_sort_detected: halt_dispatch

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # ✅ OBSERVABILITY (MINIMAL BUT CRITICAL)
  # --------------------------------------------------
  observability:
    required_metrics:
      - decision_hash
      - replay_hash
      - determinism_match (boolean)

    kpi:
      decision_determinism_rate:
        description: "Percentage of executions where decision hash == replay hash"
        target: 1.0

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # ✅ EXPLICIT NON-GOALS (PREVENT SCOPE CREEP)
  # --------------------------------------------------
  non_goals:
    - real_time_prediction_accuracy
    - optimal_driver_matching
    - economic_optimization
    - fairness_scoring
    - machine_learning_decisions

  # --------------------------------------------------
  # ✅ ENFORCEMENT NOTE
  # --------------------------------------------------
  enforcement:
    enforced_by:
      - runtime_adapter
      - admission_layer
      - guard_layer
      - replay_tests

    invariant:
      - any_non_deterministic_execution_is_invalid


===== ./ecosystems/afriride/governance/adr/adr_0011.yaml =====
schema: ecosystems.afriride.governance.adr.v1
id: ADR-0011
status: IMPLEMENTED
title: No Semantic Escalation In Dispatch Retry
authority: AFRIRIDE_GOVERNANCE
decision: >
  Retry and dispatch logic may observe declared failure classes but
  must not infer semantic equivalence, identity collapse, or authority
  escalation from representation fields.
rules:
  - RULE-0011-no-semantic-escalation
  - RULE-0012-no-equivalence-inference
  - RULE-0013-no-identity-collapsing
  - RULE-0014-no-representation-authority-propagation
bindings:
  - ecosystems/afriride/governance/bindings/bind_0011.yaml
validators:
  - ecosystems.afriride.governance.guards.guard_no_authority_escalation
  - ecosystems.afriride.governance.guards.guard_no_equivalence_inference
completion:
  empty: false
  implementation_state: IMPLEMENTED


===== ./ecosystems/afriride/governance/bindings/bind_0011.yaml =====
schema: ecosystems.afriride.governance.binding.v1
id: BIND-0011
status: IMPLEMENTED
adr: ADR-0011
authority: AFRIRIDE_GOVERNANCE
binds:
  rules:
    - RULE-0011-no-semantic-escalation
    - RULE-0012-no-equivalence-inference
    - RULE-0013-no-identity-collapsing
    - RULE-0014-no-representation-authority-propagation
  guards:
    - ecosystems.afriride.governance.guards.guard_no_semantic_fields
    - ecosystems.afriride.governance.guards.guard_no_equivalence_inference
    - ecosystems.afriride.governance.guards.guard_no_authority_escalation
    - ecosystems.afriride.governance.guards.guard_no_retry_interpretation
runtime_effect:
  violation: runtime_refusal
  replay_effect: replay_invalid
  proof_effect: governance_proof_invalid
completion:
  empty: false
  closed_world: true
